w(k)end,function(J)for h=694463-694462,#J,-895160+895161 do x[J[h]]=x[J[h]]+(626621+-626620)end if r then local y=r(true)local w=q(y)w[h(-399318+399588)],w[h(-515859+516123)],w[h(-892901+893152)]=J,W,function()return 489954+-1436534 end return y else return t({},{[h(-503646+503910)]=W,[h(471932-471662)]=J,[h(-560114+560365)]=function()return 272671+-1219251 end})end end,function(J,h)local w=f(h)local r=function(r,t)return y(J,{r;t},h,w)end return r end return(v(-607686-(-817539),{}))(w(k))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[h(307616-307330)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
